AnalyzeCalibrationSummary.description:
Game-level rollup of aux-head prediction quality, computed from the
trace once the game is done. Absent for no-aux architectures.
AnalyzeCalibrationSummary.title: AnalyzeCalibrationSummary

AnalyzeCardEmbeddings.description:
The model's learned card-embedding table and precomputed geometry.
Row order is DECK order (all trump first, then fail), UNDER last.
AnalyzeCardEmbeddings.title: AnalyzeCardEmbeddings

AnalyzeObservation.description:
The observation the model actually received (Player.get_state_dict),
decoded from card ids to card codes. Blind/bury are empty unless the
actor is the picker — this mirrors exactly what the actor sees, unlike
the omniscient `view`.
AnalyzeObservation.title: AnalyzeObservation

RulesInput.description: Full rules specification; unknown keys rejected.
RulesInput.title: RulesInput

RulesUpdate.description: Partial rules patch; only provided keys are merged.
RulesUpdate.title: RulesUpdate

get.description: Return action id to string mapping for the UI.

Describe the deployed model: architecture, capabilities, and its
card-embedding geometry. Cached per checkpoint.

post.description: Simulate a full Sheepshead game and return detailed analysis trace.

schema.title: Response List Tables Api Tables Get

get.description:
Liveness/readiness probe for uptime checks and container healthchecks.

Always returns 200 while the process is serving; ``db`` reports
best-effort connectivity so a degraded database shows up in monitoring
without taking the probe (and thus the container) down with it.
